content.body:
If anyone is interested, I've created a little AI skill for tracking the history, rationale and discussion behind existing standard wording, e.g. why a certain algorithm or concept is there in a current standard (WHATWG, w3c, IETF, etc).
I found it especially useful for the HTML standard as sometimes it needs to perform complex git queries or lookup old W3C mailing lists and a single git blame/github issue doesn't tell the whole story.
See https://github.com/noamr/web-archeologist
You have a snippet of example input, and the output you got from Gemini for that?
(generating a new one just in case I broke something)
